ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the query was submitted */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector (e.g., agriculture, horticulture) related to the query */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category (e.g., cereals, fruits) related to the query */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop type (e.g., paddy, mango) related to the query */,
  "query_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query type (e.g., plant protection, weather) */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "kcc_answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KCC answer to the query */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the query was submitted */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the query was submitted */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block where the query was submitted */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was submitted */,
  "answered_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who answered the query */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the answer was provided */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., pending, answered) */,
  "query_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the query (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_kcc_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("kcc_answer_id") REFERENCES kcc_answers ("kcc_answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_query_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_type_id") REFERENCES query_types ("query_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_answered_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("answered_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_types" (
  "query_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query type */,
  "query_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the query type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the district belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district to which the block belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, extension agent, expert) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_logs" (
  "query_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query log */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was submitted */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query at the time of logging */,
  "query_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the query at the time of logging */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the query in minutes */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the query was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kcc_answers" (
  "kcc_answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KCC answer */,
  "kcc_answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the KCC answer */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the KCC answer */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the KCC answer was created */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the KCC answer */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the KCC answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kcc_answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kcc_answers_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kcc_answers_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_answer_map" (
  "query_answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query-answer mapping */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "kcc_answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KCC answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_answer_map_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_answer_map_kcc_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("kcc_answer_id") REFERENCES kcc_answers ("kcc_answer_id")
)
